name: akarelin-skills
description: Personal productivity plugins for Claude Code — file organization, search, session management, Microsoft 365 integration, and plugin development.

plugins.name: organize
plugins.description: File organizer with sub-skills: arxiv paper organizer and medical scan-to-Obsidian processor.

plugins.name: work
plugins.description: Workplace tools with sub-skills: M365 (Mail, Calendar, Teams, Files, Tasks), Slack, and Jira.

plugins.name: devops-m365
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 tenant administration via Graph beta API — Users, Groups, Teams, Licenses, Directory Roles, Audit, Devices, Security.

plugins.name: search
plugins.description: Search plugin with sub-skills: Everything (local file search via MCP) and M365 (cross-entity Microsoft 365 search).

plugins.name: session-manager
plugins.description: Manage Claude Code session folders across repos and hosts — sync, list, resume, rename, and clean up sessions.

plugins.name: skill-manager
plugins.description: Manage and improve Claude Code plugin skills end-to-end: review feedback, patch code, test changes, rebuild and deploy .plugin files.
